basic_details.job_title: Pune Peoples Co-Op Bank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 33 Assistant Branch Manager, Branch Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Pune People's Co-operative Bank Ltd. (Multi State Bank)
basic_details.post_name: General Manager, Deputy General Manager, Deputy General Manager (Chief Law Officer), Assistant General Manager, Assistant General Manager (Investment), Branch Manager, Branch Manager (Board Secretary), Branch Manager (Estate Manager), Branch Manager (Legal Officer), Assistant Branch Manager (Marketing), Assistant Branch Manager (Graphic Designer), Assistant Branch Manager (Steno/Typist)
basic_details.job_location: Head Office – Pune; Branches – Pune, Belgaum, Thane, Chh. Sambhaji Nagar
basic_details.short_information: The bank is recruiting 33 posts across 12 designations with Graduate/Post Graduate/MBA/CAIIB/Law qualifications. Last date to apply is within 10 days from 09-06-2026 (i.e., on or before 19-06-2026).

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated by the Bank

application_fee.details: No application fee details are mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the bank's official website www.punepeoples.bank.in or contact the bank directly at 7066051999 / 7066050999 for fee-related information.

age_limit.details: Age limit varies by post as detailed below. The Board of Directors reserves the right to relax the age conditions in respect of deserving candidates.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of submission of application. All educational/technical qualifications must be from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates with higher qualifications than stipulated will be given preference. All candidates must have computer literacy and must be competent to communicate in English.

selection_process: Selection will be based on the candidate's qualifications and experience. The Board of Directors reserves the right to relax the conditions in respect of candidates. The general selection flow is:
Step 1 – Application Screening: Applications are screened based on post-wise eligibility criteria (qualification

age). Step 2 – Shortlisting: Candidates with higher qualifications than stipulated will be given preference. Computer literacy is mandatory for all posts. Step 3 – Interview: Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview at the Head Office or a designated location. Date and venue will be communicated by the bank. Step 4 – Document Verification: Original documents will be verified at the time of interview or joining.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply offline/Online. No online application mode is available. The application form must be downloaded from the bank's official website (www.punepeoples.bank.in) and filled in the prescribed format. The completed application form along with all necessary supporting documents must be submitted by post to the bank's Head Office address within 10 days from the date of advertisement (09-06-2026).
Send Application (by Post) to: Chief Executive Officer, Pune People's Co-operative Bank Ltd., 477/478, 1st Floor, Market Yard, Gultekadi, Pune – 411037
Note: The post applied for must be clearly mentioned on the application envelope. Applications submitted by any other mode will not be accepted.
Pune People's Co-Op Bank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Link
Documents Required to be Enclosed with Application Form:
Recent passport-size photograph affixed at the prescribed place and signed over
Self-attested copies of all educational qualification certificates (graduation, post-graduation, MBA, CAIIB, LLB/LLM as applicable)
Self-attested copy of experience certificates from current and previous employers clearly showing designation, period, and nature of work
Self-attested copy of age proof / date of birth certificate
Self-attested copy of computer literacy certificate (if applicable)
For legal posts: copy of Bar Council enrollment certificate / advocate registration (if applicable)
For Graphic Designer: portfolio or work samples (if applicable)
For Steno/Typist: typing speed certificate from a recognized institution
Any other certificates relevant to the post applied for
important_instructions: Candidates with higher qualifications than the stipulated minimum will be given preference - clearly mention all qualifications in the application. All candidates must be computer literate and competent to communicate in English - these are non-negotiable baseline requirements across all posts. The Board of Directors reserves the right to relax the conditions in respect of candidates - this means exceptional profiles may still be considered even if one parameter is slightly short. Applications must be submitted within 10 days from 09-06-2026 - no extensions or late submissions will be entertained. The post applied for must be clearly written on the outer envelope of the application to ensure proper routing within the Head Office. Original documents will be required for verification at the time of interview - carry all originals when called. The bank's Head Office is at Pune - candidates applying for senior management posts should be open to being based at the Head Office in Pune. For queries, contact the bank at 7066051999 / 7066050999 or visit www.punepeoples.bank.in. The bank reserves the right to increase, decrease, or cancel vacancies at any stage without further notice.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Pune People's Co-Op Bank Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date is within 10 days from the date of advertisement, i.e., on or before 19-06-2026. Applications must reach the Head Office in Pune by post within this period. Candidates are advised to dispatch their applications well in advance to avoid postal delays.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary/pay for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification does not mention specific salary details. Candidates are advised to contact the bank directly at 7066051999 / 7066050999 or visit www.punepeoples.bank.in for salary-related information. Pay is likely as per industry norms for Co-operative Banks and will be discussed at the time of interview.

faq.question: Q3. Is experience in a private bank acceptable for senior management posts?
faq.answer: For posts like General Manager, Deputy General Manager, and Assistant General Manager, the notification specifically requires experience in a Co-operative or Nationalized Bank. Experience in purely private sector banks may not fulfill this criterion. For Branch Manager (Legal Officer, Estate Manager, Board Secretary), the experience requirement is more flexible and domain-specific.

faq.question: Q4. Can I apply for more than one post?
faq.answer: The notification does not explicitly prohibit applying for more than one post. However, each application must be sent in a separate envelope with the post name clearly written on the envelope. Ensure you meet the eligibility criteria for each post you apply for.

faq.question: Q5. Is CAIIB qualification mandatory or preferred?
faq.answer: CAIIB (Certified Associate of Indian Institute of Bankers) is listed as a qualification alongside MBA for senior posts (General Manager, DGM, AGM, Branch Manager). It is not explicitly stated as mandatory vs. preferred — candidates with MBA or CAIIB are both considered. However, having CAIIB will strengthen your application for banking-specific roles.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process - is there a written test?
faq.answer: The notification does not mention a written test. Selection is based on shortlisting of applications on merit (qualifications and experience) followed by an Interview. The Board of Directors reserves the right to relax conditions for deserving candidates.

faq.answer: The last date is within 10 days from the date of advertisement, i.e., on or before 19-06-2026. Applications must reach the Head Office in Pune by post within this period. Candidates are advised to dispatch their applications well in advance to avoid postal delays.
